Game.Name: Super Ultra Baseball (Japan)
Game.plot: This is the ultimate baseball game! Precise pitching, Bulls-eye batting, and Awesome fielding! It's all under your control with simpler yet more sophisticated operation. With loads of features. You'll be an All Star! It is the ultimate baseball simulation you've dreamed of.Cheat: Force CPU Batters Ultra AbilityThis works if you are playing against a computer opponent and both teams have Ultra abilities (bottom row of teams). When you are pitching (CPU is at bat), press X to toggle your Ultra powers, then B to quickly cancel them. When you press A to throw a pitch, the batter will automatically enable their Ultra ability. This works every time against the CPU, even when playing on Expert difficulty.
